what_it_does: Records an image attachment that links a channel-memory entry to a design-source image asset identified by a URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
conventions: image:// URI scheme for asset target
concerns: No caption, alt text, or author metadata
Target URI cannot be verified or resolved from this file alone
notes: A minimal attachment record that maps a design-source channel memory entry to the image asset capital-raise/p-25.
questions: What visual content does the target image contain?
What does 'p-25' refer to (page, part, plate, or other identifier)?
Who added this attachment and for what specific purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the frontmatter declares an image attachment and the file contains exactly that metadata record.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, referenceable link between a channel memory item and a specific design-source image so it can be retrieved and audited in context.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to address a design-source image asset from a channel-memory attachment record.
contribution: Provides a stable, id'd attachment reference that associates a design-source image with a channel memory entry, enabling retrieval and provenance without embedding the image.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment record (att-5d038da2) of type images that targets the design-source image asset image://design-source/capital-raise/p-25 and records an addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to link a channel memory entry to a specific design-source image for retrieval and traceability.
